issues.title: [BUG]Fix display
issues.body: ## 🐛 Bug Report ### 📝 Description In one part of the page the display is not good the containers are not properly arranged ### 🔄 Steps to Reproduce **Steps to reproduce the behavior:** 1. Go to '...' 2. Click on '...' 3. Scroll down to '...' 4. See error ### ✅ Expected Behavior Containers should be properly aligned ### ❌ Actual Behavior Containers not properly aligned ### 📸 Screenshots ### 🌐 Environment **Please complete the following information:** - Device: Laptop - OS: Macos - Browser: Chrome - Version: [e.g. 22] - Tool: There is no problem with any tool only the display of one part of the website is not good ### 🔧 Additional Context **Add any other context about the problem here.** ### 🎯 Severity **How critical is this bug?** - [ ] 🔴 Critical (site/tool completely broken) - [ ] 🟡 High (major functionality affected) - [ ] 🟢 Medium (minor functionality affected) - [ ✔] 🔵 Low (cosmetic issue) ### 👥 For Contributors - [✔ ] I'd like to work on fixing this bug - [ ] I need help understanding the codebase - [ ✔] This is for Hacktoberfest participation --- **Thank you for helping improve DevToolkit! 🛠️**
